programme.title: Hey Arnold!: The Headless Cabbie/Friday the 13th

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: It Girl/Deconstructing Arnold

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Helga Sleepwalks/Fighting Families

programme.title: Lockup Special Investigation

programme.title: Lockup Special Investigation

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El último acto de terrorismo a los cuarteles de NCIS perpetrado por Harper Dearing en el final de la temporada pasada, provoca que diferentes agencias se unan en su búsqueda.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo investiga la causa de una misteriosa muerte que involucra a un empleado de armería de NCIS que fue descubierto cuatro meses después del atentado a los campos de la Marina.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Aún en su licencia médica, Ducky decide re abrir un caso de hace 12 años ordenando la exhumación de un comandante de la Marina.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga el caso de un entrenamiento de helicóptero que termina en desastre en alta mar.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Quien se aleja
programme.desc: Cuando la inmunidad diplomática complica un caso de abuso infantil para Danny y Baez, Frank interviene, a pesar de no tener jurisdicción en el caso.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Dentro y fuera
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el asesinato de un líder de pandilla, Danny y Baez descubren que el presunto asesino es un ex convicto que tiene una relación romántica con su oficial de libertad condicional, quien podría estar ayudando a encubrir el crimen.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Almas perdidas
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el asesinato de un conductor ebrio que mató a una madre y su hijo, Danny y Baez se debaten entre cumplir con su deber y buscar justicia al descubrir la conexión entre el sospechoso y la víctima.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Apuesta alta
programme.desc: Cuando el hermano de Linda, Jimmy (Kevin Dillon), se mete en problemas con la mafia, le suplica a Danny que lo ayude a mantenerse a salvo hasta que la situación se calme

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC viaja a Arizona a investigar una serie de crímenes metódicos ocurridos a mujeres, el final es desconcertante. Dentro del equipo también se vive incertidumbre porque Hotch puede ser el remplazo de Strauss quien murió en la temporada pasada.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC sigue en Arizona investigando acerca de la vida familiar del sospechoso, el cual tenía un gemelo idéntico, pero la madre nunca se lo dijo a la policía.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un francotirador dispara en Dallas, la BAU investiga si el próximo aniversario del asesinato de Kennedy es un factor de motivación, pero descubrirán que en realidad va a matar la mujer de quien lo contrato.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC conoce a su nuevo jefe, Mateo Cruz, un antiguo conocido de JJ. Cruz se une al equipo mientras peinan las calles de Baltimore en busca de un sospechoso que deja a las víctimas incapaces de comunicarse.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El último acto de terrorismo a los cuarteles de NCIS perpetrado por Harper Dearing en el final de la temporada pasada, provoca que diferentes agencias se unan en su búsqueda.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: While attempting to break up a fight between two women an officer is attacked by one of the brawler’s boyfriends. Officers confiscate a negligible amount of marijuana from a man during a routine traffic stop. A man is arrested for domestic abuse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A sizable amount of cocaine is seized during a routine search. An officer responds to a domestic dispute call, in which there are conflicting stories at the scene. An officer’s patrol car is nearly struck by a train, twice.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man is questioned for assaulting a woman on a train. A man is arrested for burglarizing a casino, he initially denies the charges but surveillance footage corroborates. A father kicks his son out of the house after his drinking becomes problematic.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man wearing women’s underwear exposes himself. While on patrol officers question a naked man in the backseat of a vehicle who explains to officers that he’s camping. It takes several officers to take down a deranged naked man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman bites both the arresting officer and a store manager after getting caught stealing beer. The passenger of a suspicious vehicle is caught attempting to hide drugs in the seat. Police respond to a domestic abuse call involving a knife and two women.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Several units are in pursuit of a stolen vehicle. A man is found unconscious behind the wheel of a car after he crashed into a tree. Officers intervene in domestic dispute between a stripper and her boyfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Undercover officers set up a sting operation to nab people looking to buy drugs. A woman tries to conceal drugs in her mouth. Then a repeat offender who has a history of threatening officers with a tainted needle is arrested.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Narcotics officers end up in a foot chase during a buy-bust operation. Officers respond to a dispute with a tow truck driver at a strip club. The odor of marijuana on a traffic stop leads to a citation for the cooperative driver.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police investigate an attempted residential robbery that turned deadly. Officers visit a residence to find a suspect facing warrant charges. A high-speed chase comes to an end when the suspect crashes into a fence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer subdues a young man in mental duress before paramedics arrive to treat him. Officers stop a suspicious vehicle and find drug paraphernalia inside the woman's car. Officers respond to a robbery in progress.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers give chase to a suspect on a bike. A vehicle is pulled over and a passenger is arrested for possession of drug paraphernalia. Police are given a classic "I'm holding it for a friend" excuse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A white-knuckled police chase ends in a dramatic escape and an unsettling officer injury. An intoxicated prowler is reported after a woman spots him in a tree. Officers bring in the K-9 unit to sniff out a suspicious van.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers utilize the help of the K-9 unit to find a suspect hiding in a shed. A cooperative suspect is faced with a list of charges. A motorcycle chase comes to an end after the suspect ditches the stolen bike and attempts to flee on foot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Prostitute sting operations prove successful for undercover officers in both Wichita, KS and Palm Beach, FL. Officers inform an unsuspecting John that the individual offering up services is likely not who he thinks they are.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An arrest is made in a buy-bust sting operation after a hobbled dealer attempts to flee on foot. An elderly man is questioned after a report that he kicked a juvenile male in the face. A man is shot in the head by his female roommate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An open container and crack pipe are discovered inside a teen's vehicle. Officers find a man at a nearby residence lifting weights after trying to evade police. A fight involving two men and a shovel is broken up.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police respond to a fight in progress call, officers tail a vehicle leaving a house known for drug activity, and a man calls the police after his wife pushes his Harley over.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police find a burglary suspect up a tree in a California backyard, a parolee at large attempts to flee officers, and a man with a suspended license blows his second chance.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a fight in progress involving mace at a minimart, and a woman tells police that her boyfriend threatened to flush her late husband's ashes down the drain.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man riding a bike at night with no lights decides to take off rather than talk with police, and a dangerous domestic dispute unfolds on the streets of Texas.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer pulls over a man making hand gestures at him while driving, an ex-Marine explains his side of a fight, and a traffic stop reveals a truck full of dogs and drugs.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call that a man shot up his parents' house, a fleeing suspect hopes a change of clothes will fool the police, and a shaky hit-and-run story unravels.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man's addiction forces his family to call the police for help, a driver abandons his car and tries to evade officers on foot, and a man tries to conceal his illegal stash.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An uncooperative driver leads police on a high-speed chase, and an alleged convenience store robber in custody won't settle down until he gets a kiss from his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A patrol car en route to a call spooks a driver who then takes off at high speed, leading the officers to pursue him instead, and police investigate shots fired on a home.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers deploy a police dog to persuade a reluctant suspect to come down off a roof, and an outdoor birthday celebration is crashed by an alleged drunk driver.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police deploy spike strips to curb a stolen vehicle, a parolee at large speeds away with a two-month-old in the car, and officers try to determine the details of a stabbing.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead and her hair is done up '70s style complete with vintage clothes, the CSI team discovers clues that point to a killer with a hair fetish.

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: Señales de amor

programme.title: Las estafadoras

programme.title: El Paciente Inglés
programme.desc: Poderosa e inolvidable, la ganadora de 9 premios Óscar, incluso Mejor Película, Mejor Director (Anthony Minghella) y Mejor Actriz de Reparto (Juliette Binoche), desarrolla una increíble historia de pasión, intriga y aventura.

programme.title: Volando Alto
programme.desc: Gwyneth Paltrow protagoniza en esta comedia hilarante sobre una chica de pueblo con grandes planes. Cuando se propone ser azafata internacional de primera clase, Donna se arriesga y sale a perseguir su sueño.

programme.title: Señales de amor

programme.title: ¿Por qué nací mujer?

programme.title: El proceso de las señoritas Vivanco

programme.title: Las Señoritas Vivanco
programme.desc: Dos hermanas solteronas creen que cometer un robo deja de ser considerado como pecado luego de ir a la confesión.

programme.desc: Don Chente y Dolores son un matrimonio que dirige una modesta pero exitosa tortería. Cuando sus hijos regresan tras terminar sus estudios en el extranjero, deberán lidiar con sus refinados gustos y constantes solicitudes económicas.

programme.title: El abogado del mal
programme.desc: El abogado Richard Ramsay (Keanu Reeves) trabaja en un caso difícil para defender a Mike Lassiter, de 17 años, sospechoso de asesinar a su adinerado padre.

programme.title: Justicia roja
programme.desc: Un estadounidense (Richard Gere) está en China por un viaje de negocios. Le acusan de un brutal asesinato y se encuentra a merced de un sistema judicial extranjero que no entiende. ¿Encontrará al verdadero asesino antes de que sea demasiado tarde?

programme.title: El abogado del mal
programme.desc: El abogado Richard Ramsay (Keanu Reeves) trabaja en un caso difícil para defender a Mike Lassiter, de 17 años, sospechoso de asesinar a su adinerado padre.

programme.title: Knock knock: seducción fatal
programme.desc: El gesto amable de un hombre de familia (Keanu Reeves) se convierte en una peligrosa seducción y el juego mortal del gato y el ratón cuando les abre la puerta a dos desamparadas jovencitas.

programme.title: Jugadores
programme.desc: Los ganadores del Óscar, Matt Damon y Edward Norton, protagonizan Rounders. Un exadicto a las apuestas regresa a las mesas en una apuesta de vida o muerte para rescatar a su amigo.

programme.title: Están todos bien
programme.desc: Cuando los hijos de Frank Goode (Robert DeNiro) cancelan una reunión familiar, el viudo emprende un viaje por el país para reconectarse con ellos. Esperando compartir las alegrías de sus vidas felices, sus visitas revelan una imagen no muy perfecta.

programme.title: Frida (ESP)
programme.desc: Salma Hayek triunfa en esta película biográfica de una mujer excepcional que vivió una vida inolvidable, Frida Kahlo. Está dirigida por Julie Taymor y cuenta con un elenco de apoyo que incluye a Alfred Molina, Antonio Banderas y Diego Luna.

programme.title: Una vida sin terminar
programme.desc: Einar Gilkyson (Robert Redford) vive en una hacienda de Wyoming con su único amigo, Mitch (Morgan Freeman), cuando la mujer a la que culpa por la muerte de su único hijo llega a su puerta sin dinero, desesperada y con una nieta a la que no conocía.

programme.title: Están todos bien
programme.desc: Cuando los hijos de Frank Goode (Robert DeNiro) cancelan una reunión familiar, el viudo emprende un viaje por el país para reconectarse con ellos. Esperando compartir las alegrías de sus vidas felices, sus visitas revelan una imagen no muy perfecta.

programme.title: Confessions Of A Dangerous Mind
programme.desc: Mientras el inconformista creador de los programas de juegos favoritos de EE. UU. gana notoriedad por sus éxitos, se ve atraído al mundo de las operaciones encubiertas del gobierno. George Clooney dirige esta historia más extraña que la ficción.

programme.title: Aventura en Alaska
programme.desc: Tras graduarse de la Universidad Emory en 1992, el estudiante estrella y atleta Christopher McCandless abandonó sus posesiones, entregó sus ahorros de $24.000 a la caridad y se fue a dedo hasta Alaska a vivir en la naturaleza.

programme.title: El gringo
programme.desc: "El hombre" cruza a México con $2,000,000 en efectivo y un plan para vivir lo que le queda en la playa, pero se queda atrapado en el pueblo "El Fronteras". Bajo ataque de policías corruptos, debe salvar "El Fronteras" a través de espectaculares tiroteos.

programme.title: Redención
programme.desc: Jason Statham interpreta a un cobrador que trabaja para un jefe de la mafia local en este thriller de acción de alto octanaje. Afectado por el asesinato de un amigo y consumido por deseos de venganza, se sumerge en un mundo de violencia.

programme.title: Peligro inminente
programme.desc: Cuando su mentor, el almirante James Greer, se enferma, Ryan es nombrado director en funciones de la CIA.

programme.title: El pacificador
programme.desc: Cuando un tren que transporta ojivas nucleares se estrella en la Unión Soviética, la especialista nuclear Dra. Kelly descubre que el accidente es en realidad parte de un complot para cubrir el robo de las armas.

programme.title: Redención
programme.desc: Jason Statham interpreta a un cobrador que trabaja para un jefe de la mafia local en este thriller de acción de alto octanaje. Afectado por el asesinato de un amigo y consumido por deseos de venganza, se sumerge en un mundo de violencia.

programme.title: La última pelea
programme.desc: La última pelea" narra la conmovedora e inspiracional historia de la familia Conlon, Brendan (Joel Edgerton), Tommy (Tom Hardy) y Paddy (Nick Nolte), quienes encuentran redención en la arena al luchar para arreglarse a sí mismos y a su familia.

programme.title: Perro Genial
programme.desc: Una familia debe mudarse a un apartamento en la ciudad de Nueva York que tenga una política estricta de no mascotas.

programme.title: El hijo de Rambow
programme.desc: Una historia fresca sobre la amistad, la familia, los héroes cinematográficos y la riesgosa aventura de crecer en la era del video.

programme.title: Max
programme.desc: Un perro que ayudó a los soldados en Afganistán vuelve a los EUA, donde lo adopta la familia de su adiestrador tras sufrir una experiencia traumática.

programme.title: Max 2: el héroe de la casa blanca
programme.desc: Max, el héroe canino del servicio secreto del presidente de Estados Unidos, vuelve a la acción. Debe mantener a la hija del lider ruso y al hijo del presidente a salvo mientras descubren un alarmante complot que pone en peligro a ambas naciones.

programme.title: Tormenta terrestre
programme.desc: Un asteroide galpea el lado oscura de la luna, desencadenando cambios climáticos en la tierra.

programme.title: Inmersión letal
programme.desc: Paul Walker y Jessica Alba esperan pasar unos momentos inolvidables buceando, pero se meten en un lío con un traficante cuando encuentran la carga ilícita de un avión hundido en este thriller submarino lleno de acción y sorpresas.

programme.title: Garras
programme.desc: Michael Douglas y Val Kilmer protagonizan esta gran aventura ambientada en el África Oriental de 1896. Dos leones asesinos interrumpen la construcción del ferrocarril. Cazan juntos, sin mostrar temor por el hombre o las armas de fuego.

programme.title: Nacho Libre
programme.desc: Jack Black encarna el papel más gracioso como Ignacio, un cocinero de monasterio que alimenta huérfanos de día y por las noches se transforma en Nacho Libre, un notorio luchador en calzas.

programme.desc: Murphy protagoniza a un Norbit apacible, que recibe una segunda oportunidad con el amor de su infancia, Kate. Sin embargo, los obstáculos podrían complicar este romance más de lo esperado.

programme.desc: Los padres de Santi están divorciados, y él está acostumbrado a vivir con ellos pero por separado. Tras una urgente cirugía para salvar su vista, Santi decide hacer una lista de deseos por cumplir pero con sus padres unidos.

programme.desc: Una mujer de 40 años le pide a su vecino de 23 años, a quien detesta, que finja ser su hijo, durante un viaje de fin de semana para obtener un trabajo que le ayudará a regresar a la vida que perdió.

programme.desc: En el Día Sagrado de las Muertes, una madre regresa y descubre que sus tres hijos son desconsiderados, feos y vagos.

programme.title: El robo del siglo
programme.desc: Basada en hechos reales, un grupo de ladrones realizó el que se considera uno de los robos bancarios más famosos e inteligentes de la historia de Argentina al robar la sucursal del Banco Río en Acassuso.

programme.title: Cuento de Navidad
programme.desc: ¡Vive el espíritu de la Navidad con este clásico de animación! Basada en uno de los cuentos navideños más apreciados y con las voces de algunas de las estrellas más brillantes, esta fascinante película es un regalo divertido para toda la familia.

programme.title: Una Propuesta Navideña
programme.desc: Una abogada se enfrenta a su antiguo novio para defender su pequeña ciudad de la demolición.

programme.title: El regalo de Navidad
programme.desc: Una periodista decide escribir un artículo navideño sobre su búsqueda de un “Amigo Secreto” de su infancia, cuyo regalo anónimo tuvo un gran impacto en su vida.

programme.title: El caso del diamante navideño
programme.desc: Acusan a una mujer de robar una gema, pero ella buscará al culpable en medio de una letanía de huéspedes ricos.

programme.title: La mejor Navidad
programme.desc: Gloria, enfocada en su trabajo en Miami después de su divorcio, envía a sus hijos a pasar la Navidad con su exmarido en Jalisco. Lo que no imaginan es que esta decisión les va a cambiar la vida.

programme.title: Victor Crowley
programme.desc: Diez años después de la terrible masacre, el único sobreviviente, Andrew Yong, se ve obligado a regresar al Pantano de la Isla Honey, pero por una de esas extrañas vueltas de la vida, Victor Crowley es resucitado por error.

programme.title: El lobo de snow hollow
programme.desc: El sheriff de un pueblo pequeño y su apático equipo de oficiales deben resolver una serie de asesinatos que ocurren en la luna llena. Mientras es consumido por la búsqueda del asesino, lucha por recordarse a sí mismo que los hombres lobo no existen...

programme.title: Stephen King: la bala de plata
programme.desc: En esta película de terror, basada en la novela Ciclo del hombre lobo, de Stephen King. Un hombre lobo está aterrorizando a un pequeño pueblo y depende de un niño discapacitado, Marty Coslaw, y su tío para liberar la ciudad de su bestial amenaza.

programme.title: La leyenda del jinete sin cabeza
programme.desc: Johnny Depp es Ichabod Crane, un investigador decidido a detener los asesinatos del Jinete Sin Cabeza.

programme.title: El lobo de snow hollow

programme.title: Sam Whiskey
programme.desc: Welcome to America's Wild - and very wacky - West! Burt Reynolds, Clint Walker, Ossie Davis and Angie Dickinson star in this tongue-in-cheek tale of love, lust and larceny as an amiable con-artist is hire by a sexy widow to break into the U.S. Mint.

programme.title: The Missouri Breaks
programme.desc: Marlon Brando and Jack Nicholson ignite the screen in this rousing story of a wealthy Montana rancher who hires a professional killer to track down a gang of horse thieves.

programme.title: Hour Of The Gun
programme.desc: Director John Sturges presents a reworking of the Wyatt Earp/Doc Holliday legend and the struggle for political control of Tombstone, with a marvelous trio of antagonists: James Garner as Earp, Jason Robards as Holliday, and Robert Ryan as Clanton.

programme.title: The Alamo
programme.desc: John Wayne produces, directs and stars in this retelling of the Alamo, a battle in which 185 men joined together against an army of 7,000. Filmed entirely in Texas, "The Alamo" is a visually stunning and historically accurate celebration of courage.

programme.title: Man of the West
programme.desc: Screen legend Gary Cooper demonstrates why he will always be remembered as one of the most authentic stars of the screen. Capable yet vulnerable, Cooper's portrayal of a former outlaw whose past returns to haunt him ranks among his very best.

programme.title: Along Came Jones
programme.desc: Gary Cooper gives a marvelous, tongue-in-cheek performance as a fumble-fingered cowpoke who is mistaken for a notorious bandit and almost gets killed by both sides of the law...all while managing to capture the attention of Loretta Young.

programme.title: The Bellboy
programme.desc: Lewis stars as Stanley, a non-speaking, bumbling bellhop at the ritzy Fontainebleau Hotel in Florida’s Miami Beach. Guests may come and guests may go, but Stanley is on duty day after day at the posh resort, encountering all sorts of catastrophes.

programme.title: Cinderfella
programme.desc: Jerry Lewis plays Cinderfella – a hard-working and honest lad mistreated by his wicked stepmother and his two boorish stepbrothers. But miracles do happen when his Fairy Godfather transforms the klutzy fella into an eligible, handsome bachelor.

programme.title: The Disorderly Orderly
programme.desc: Poor Jerome Littlefield. He wants to be a doctor, but he's incredibly squeamish. So he settles for the job of an orderly at the Whitestone Sanitarium, a career move that’s guaranteed to keep the patients in stitches!

programme.title: I Know Where I'm Going!
programme.desc: A young Englishwoman goes to the Hebrides to marry her older, wealthier fiancé. When the weather keeps them separated on different islands, she begins to have second thoughts.

programme.title: A Canterbury Tale
programme.desc: Set amid the tumult of the Second World War, the film follows three modern-day incarnations of Chaucer’s pilgrims, who are forced to solve a bizarre village crime in the English countryside en route to the mythical town of Canterbury.

programme.title: The Red Shoes
programme.desc: A young ballet dancer is torn between the man she loves and her pursuit to become a prima ballerina.

programme.title: Black Narcissus
programme.desc: A group of nuns struggle to establish a convent in the Himalayas, while isolation, extreme weather, altitude, and culture clashes all conspire to drive the well-intentioned missionaries mad.

programme.title: The Odd Couple (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Felix tries to reform after his finicky attitude towards food ruins an otherwise pleasant dinner with his ex-wife.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Mike and Robbie each have dates the same night. Due to a mix up in names, Mike picks up Robbie's young date (Trudi Ames), and Robbie picks up an older woman (Carole Costello), meant for Mike.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Four attractive flight attendants move into the Pearson's house, and while Bub and the boys befriend them right away, Steve is annoyed by all the noise from a party for their pilot friends.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Bub wants to do something different than dishes and dusting. He goes on interviews for different jobs.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Chip is all set to go on a business trip with his father to Chicago. When Steve's plans change, he is headed for Paris. Chip decides to sneak on to the plane to join his father. In Paris, he gets lost.

programme.title: Daria

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: La señora Cartman se va a una fiesta por la lluvia de meteoritos y deja a su hijo a cuidado de Shelley. Ahora, Cartman tiene que lidiar con los abusos de Shelley, su novio de 22 años y su gata que está celo.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Los chicos se enloquecen por "Chinpokomon" (parodia de Pókemon) y quieren comprar los muñecos, los videojuegos y cualquier cosa de ellos. Lo malo es que los japoneses que los hacen les están lavando el cerebro para invadir Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: “Paco, el Flaco” encuentra una nave espacial y la usa para escapar de una secta cristiana en Etiopía, y buscar un nuevo hogar para él y su pueblo. Mientras tanto, el gobierno interroga a los chicos para obtener información sobre Paco.

programme.title: South Park

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El calentamiento global trae consigo una mueva amenaza para la ciudad, mientras que Irma y Peluzín emprenden en un nuevo negocio, reclutando a varios amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: The Maury Show: 5 Men Tested … Are Any of Them My Baby's Dad?
programme.desc: Tony cheated on his wife Tiff and impregnated another woman. Now he’s denying both of their kids! Plus, more shocking tales of mad moms, denying dads and DNA drama!

programme.title: The Maury Show: Top Ten Shocking Family Feuds
programme.desc: We’re counting down the top ten most unbelievable moments of family faceoffs! Plus we’ll let you know what happened to some of these guests after they left our show and returned to their lives.

programme.title: The Maury Show: 4 Women … 4 Babies … Is He the Father?
programme.desc: We have more of the paternity pandemonium that you crave! You’ll see denying dads, mad moms and some of the most shocking results we’ve ever seen! Don’t miss one second of the drama on today’s MAURY!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Toni, Quintin, and his mom return to find out who fathered his son. This time they’ll wonder if Toni cheated! Jenny needs to know whether her husband Matt or his friend fathered her child! Finally, will Vivian end her 30-year search for her son?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: 22-year-old Vernetta says 55-year-old Ronnie is her son's father and lied about his age when they hooked up! Next, is Krystal sleeping with her own relatives? Could their kids not be his? Plus, Keke returns to tell Tyrone a secret!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Charisma suspects her boyfriend Trey is sleeping with another woman…her cousin Kisha! Next, Jamie and Byron return with fresh cheating accusations about Byron! Will this on-and-off-again couple truly split when the results come out?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Deshan's sister and mother believe he's lying about Joshua Jr.'s paternity and want a paternity test to have the last word! Then, 24-year-old Melissa had a baby with 47-year-old Rob, but Rob's daughter wants DNA proof! Find out today on MAURY!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Saundra is 58 and dating 28 –year-old Ernesto. She suspects he's cheating with her 38-year-old daughter! Then, a wedding is in danger when Shante caught her fiancé texting her niece! Did Kandi catch her fiancé Jason watching his own video?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Regina says Fernando fathered her son! Fernando's mother disagrees. His father and aunt believe Regina. Fernando can't sound off because he was killed. Krystal and Ben can't agree on their relationship status and who fathered Krystal's daughter!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Tiara wants De'Ron to admit that he fathered her baby! He claims the proof lies in fingers: his fiancée Diamond's baby has two pinky fingers like him, but Tiara's baby doesn't! Later, did Michelle have a baby with Mitchell's brother-in-law Shane?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Tyrell wants to clear his name that he has not been sleeping with his brother's girlfriend. Plus, Archie proved to his girlfriend Crystal that he didn't cheat on her, but they're back because she has a secret to reveal!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Kayla loves her fiancé Toby enough to let him, his kids, and baby-mama Lyndsey move in with her! Has he been sleeping with Lyndsey? Geisha's 15-year relationship with Indo might end if he admits to working as a pimp and cheating with his co-worker!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Is Tanille's baby also King's ninth child? Then, is Adonis the father of Cece's child? Plus, Melissa fell for her 41-year-old coworker Joey, but he vanished after she confessed to being pregnant. Who are the dads?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Not only does Michelle think Dwayne has a secret alias, but she also suspects he is possibly having an affair with her sister Tiffany. Then, Colleen is sick of his constant lies and wants to know if he has a secret life as "Big Daddy Russ!"

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Brittany has been trying to prove Dionte is the father of her child for 3 years. But Dionte and his mom Monique say they knew Brittany was pregnant! Then, Camara and her best friend Nicole want to confront Chris for denying Camara's baby.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: One man…four DNA results…is Darren the father? Crystal and Myrissa both have 2-year old kids and claim that Darren's the dad. Later, mothers and grandmothers want to get to the truth about the paternity questions haunting their family.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Kisha wants to know why she found her sister Kim and her husband Shannon in bed together watching The Maury Show. She also found a photo of Shannon on Kim's phone! Then, Joe's wife Melissa caught him sending a racy photo to her best friend Brandy!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Diamond says SP begged her to have his kid. Jenell says SP wanted to have a third kid with her! SP denies both kids! Does Tone owe Tonya's mom over $3,000 in child support? Is Jacob the father of Tyler and Matina's child?

programme.desc: En 1997, se encontró el carro de Kelly Eckart, con todas sus pertenencias aún dentro del mismo, después de haber trabajado un turno nocturno en Franklin, Indiana. Días más tarde, se encontró su cuerpo en un barranco aislado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La esposa de un oficial de policía muy respetado es asesinada en su propio hogar. El crimen quedó sin resolver por más de una década, hasta que se forma una nueva unidad de casos sin resolver, que le dan un nuevo vistazo a la evidencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Dientes o Consecuencias
programme.desc: La investigación de un asesinato se ve obstaculizada por la falta de un cuerpo, pero la policía encuentra algunos restos carbonizados, incluyendo un diente cuyo relleno contiene propiedades que ayudan a los investigadores a identificar el cadáver.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1969, la operadora telefónica de 25 años, Diane Maxwell, es violada y asesinada. Su hermano prometió que averiguaría quién fue el responsable y llevaría al asesino ante la justicia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la víspera de Navidad de 2005, se encuentra el cuerpo de un hombre ardiendo cerca de Baltimore. Finalmente fue identificado como Wesley Person, de 26 años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Un embrague de testigos
programme.desc: Dos testigos presenciales pueden tener la llave de la muerte de un miembro de una pandilla de motociclistas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra muerta a Wanda Mason, empleada de una tienda, los investigadores descubren que la cámara de seguridad de la tienda ha captado todo el asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Reencuentro
programme.desc: Durante años, una mujer sufrió lo que parecían ser los efectos secundarios desagradables del litio, un medicamento recetado para tratar el trastorno bipolar.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pistas de Elefante
programme.desc: Los asesinatos de una pareja de ancianos dejan a la policía perpleja hasta que, dos años después, reciben un gran alivio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer joven de repente se enferma gravemente y, finalmente, no puede caminar. Una prueba de médula ósea revela la causa: arsénico.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En poco más de un mes, dos mujeres que han vivido en el mismo complejo de apartamentos fueron brutalmente asesinadas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una bailarina de gogó le dijo a su familia que necesitaba alejarse por un tiempo, y luego simplemente desapareció. Los investigadores sospecharon, porque ella no se llevó ni su auto ni su ropa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer joven es apuñalada más de 100 veces. El asesino deja atrás el ADN, pero los investigadores deben jugar al gato y al ratón para obtener el ADN de un sospechoso que coincida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, la policía de Virginia Beach llegó al departamento de Makdessi para encontrar los cuerpos ensangrentados de Elise Makdessi y de Quincy Brown, un soldado de la Marina. ¿Pero era el amante de Elise o su agresor?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Esta examinación del papel que juegan las autopsias en las investigaciones de asesinatos se centra en la sospechosa muerte de Virginia Ridley.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En una noche con vientos en Kansas en 1995, un misterioso incendio arrasó con la casa de un doctor prominente. Entre los escombros, los investigadores encontraron evidencia que les dijo cómo comenzó el incendio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un bebé es trasladado urgentemente a la sala de emergencias con problemas respiratorios graves. En meses, hay más de 30 casos similares. ¿Pueden los médicos encontrar la causa y la cura?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se descubre el cuerpo descompuesto de una adolescente, la policía no tiene pistas sobre su identidad.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Rompiendo el molde
programme.desc: El hijo de tres años de unos padres de Dripping Springs, Texas, desarrolla una condición respiratoria.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Enamorado mortal
programme.desc: Un obstetra regresó a casa del hospital y encontró a su esposa en el piso del baño. Estaba cubierta de sangre y no respiraba.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Paintball
programme.desc: En 1962, la gente de la pequeña ciudad de Hanford, California, perdió la sensación de paz cuando una de las vecinas, Marlene Miller, de 15 años, fue asesinada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Mientras estaba de vacaciones en California, Earl Morris se entera de que su esposa ha desaparecido de su casa en Arizona. La búsqueda de Ruby Morris involucra a decenas de investigadores y científicos – incluyendo también a la Guardia Costera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se denuncia la desaparición de una mujer tras una pelea con su marido. La policía sospecha de un hombre que denunció un incendio en su automóvil. En el interior se encuentran dos diminutas gotas de sangre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1993, Kathryn Bishop de 82 años es encontrada muerta en su hogar de Pennsylvania. Pequeñas pistas en el cuerpo de la víctima le dirán a la policía lo que pasó esa noche.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2002, una pequeña comunidad en el norte del estado de Nueva York quedó devastada cuando Patty Wlasiuk murió en un accidente de camión.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Este episodio documenta un atentado mortal en una iglesia en Oakwood, Illinois, en diciembre de 1997.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Veterans fight for their jobs as new girls try to live their dreams and make DCC Training Camp. Standing in their way is; panel Interviews, solos, an exhausting dance combination and a room full of very tough judges.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The new candidates' eyes are opened as they get a taste of what it is to be a DCC. As girls struggle to learn the dances, the reality of being "Big Time", sets in. Melissa Rycroft meets the new girls for the first time.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With the first cut looming, the girls must push their dance skills to the limit. Melissa Rycroft works to bring out showmanship. Extra stress is added on Makeover day as the girls try to get the DCC look.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: A new choreographer shakes things up. The girls better start looking good because uniform fittings and the Belk fashion show are on the agenda. Surprises continue when two-time Grammy winner Kacey Musgraves, stops by rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Melissa Rycroft makes a house call to help Yuko. Kitty Carter rocks a few of the candidate's worlds. Cameos give Kelli & Judy a fresh perspective on the girls. At Show Group auditions, the girls let it all hang out.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kellie Pickler comes to a rehearsal to share her experience and motivate the girls as Training Camp is coming to an end. Melissa Rycroft makes Kelsey aware of a big mistake. Candace Romo helps with a big night of cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Squad announcement is bittersweet as some favorites go home. The team has their first appearance at the Star Ribbon cutting. Game Day is when dreams come true!

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of beautiful and talented women converge on AT&T Stadium to start the hardest audition process in professional sports, trying out for a coveted spot on the most famous NFL cheerleading squad in the world, the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With the field narrowed down to 119 women, the pressure is on. They must quickly learn a power pom routine and the famous kickline in order to perform it an hour later before the judges.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The veterans finally enter the audition process. Now all 83 women are judged head to head during a panel interview, a solo dance performance and on their appearance on the football field as seen and the big screen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: 44 women begin the very first training camp at the new 1 billion dollar Cowboys' facility, The Star. At the First Meeting, Kelli lays down the law and makes it clear that eight women will be sent home this summer.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: First, the ladies need to have the "classic look" of a Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader. Kelli's hair and make-up transformations are legendary. The ladies are also assessed through a new state of the art fitness test, "Styku".

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli media trains the rookie candidates to determine who best represents the DCC at press events. NBC news anchor, Meredith Land tests their on-camera interview skills.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Personality is critical when representing the DCC brand. Kelli takes the women on location to see how they interact during a public appearance.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Katy Perry's choreographer, Nick Florez, stops by to offer some performance advice to the ladies. A day that each cheerleader never forgets. The first time they wear the DCC uniform to pose for their cameo photos.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The squad goes on an appearance to support pop music star, Demi Lovato. The ladies learn the entrance to the famed pre-game dance. It's a make or break moment. If a woman can't learn it quickly it might be her last night.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a stressful audition, Maya tosses her cello in the trash, and decides to have more fun. The competition between Drew and Clare intensifies. Connor offers Eli some advice about love.

programme.desc: School's out and summer's in! A few lucky Degrassi students are bound for a once-in-a-lifetime trip to Paris, accompanied by some fresh new faces. And then there are others playing counselor at Degrassi Day Camp.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Despite her illness, Clare is determined to remain a regular girl. Alli is lonely in Paris and tries to make the best of it without her BF and Tristan tries to 'bro' up while rooming with the guys.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare receives crushing news while waiting for her MRI results. Needing time away from the hospital, Clare convinces Drew to help her escape.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.desc: Adam takes Dallas' advice and tries juggling two girls at once. But he's not that kind of guy. When upset Tristan goes AWOL in Paris, Maya enlists her sworn enemy for help find him and Alli continues to try and find balance in her relationships.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew does his best as Degrassi President but without sleep, he's not much good. By Drew's side, Zoë becomes the first lady of Degrassi. Leo does damage control and tries to get in with Alli's friends.

programme.desc: The opportunity to write for a real-life magazine is offered to Clare but her brain after cancer is not cooperating.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.desc: Drew attempts juggling his new job and his new girl. To forget about Leo, Alli focusses on her science experiment. After getting thrown out of class for forgetting to wear a bra, Imogen plans a scathing piece for Degrassi TV.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Failing at balancing his life, Drew decides he has to break up with Zoë. Alli partners up with Dallas in an attempt to stay focused on her science experiment. Imogen takes her dress code fight online, but what does she really want to achieve?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A shocking discovery leads Miles to question his family life. Eli is slipping away, and Clare finds herself growing closer to Drew. Dallas wants to be with Alli, but the truth about her relationship with Leo could send him over the edge.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth

programme.title: Ancient Voices

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David travels the world to unravel some of the wonders and puzzles of palaeontology. But how do you find the world's oldest and rarest reptile?

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: Could pterodactyls fly? And why did trilobites have such good eyes? David Attenborough investigates the secret lives of animals from the past, as told in the fossil record.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The evolution of the predators who lived 550 million years ago, and how the first amphibians migrated from sea to land.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: A look at the science that has proved Darwin's idea that intelligent, sophisticated humans have an ancestral connection with the ape.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: NASA astronauts Suni Williams and Leland Melvin have worked on the International Space Station, but need Cesar's help with canine problems.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A couple of German shepherd pups with a shadowy obedience track records; a rescue dog with trust issues.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An Australian Shepherd behaves aggressively after being attacked by a couple of dogs; a shelter dog won't stop biting and snapping at potential owners.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An aggressive Manchester Terrier; a Wheaton Terrier with poor social skills; a dog who is afraid of the ocean.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Nate Brouwer and Charnae Wright bonded through their love of dogs and the outdoors, but their feuding dogs are threatening to tear them apart.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A dog trained to sniff out contraband cell phones in prisons is unable to do his job due to his skittish nature; a dog is terrified of hot air balloons.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A dogo Argentino with canine aggression; a terrier/corgi mix who becomes aggressive when faced with traveling.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Mufasa, a South African boerboel, became aggressive after being pinned down by another dog; Tucker, a teacup poodle, behavior becomes more aggressive.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A couple with three unruly dogs, one with aggression issues; a poodle who fears the back door since running into the screen door; a Weimaraner who is territorial and aggressive.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A dog with an abusive past fears men; a Border Collie mix refuses to leave his chair and is afraid of leashes.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Aggressive bulldog Hugo is sent to canine rehab; Crusty must overcome his dominance issues if he's ever going to enjoy walks.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A dog becomes aggressive when he sees other dogs; a Newfoundland does not eat; a dog runs out of the house whenever the door opens.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog discovers today's prey is a notorious ladies man, he knows just how to lure him in. The trap includes a suggestive phone call, a motel rendezvous, and a crew of bounty hunters waiting in the next room ready to break up the party!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's fugitive is accused of assaulting a police officer, so Dog and the team are not taking any chances. So Dog has to play on his target's greed and deploy some modern technology to set a trap for this runner.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa wakes up in a jail cell, but ignores the ensuing media frenzy in order to befriend a woman waging a personal battle against drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A fugitive with a long criminal record has fled to Hawaii, and the bondsman on the mainland has asked Dog for help. Dog doesn't have much information to work with, but he can use the felon's desire to impress his friends to track him down.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: To his traditional bounty hunting tools of confidential informants, canvassing, and silver-tongued subterfuge, the world's greatest bounty hunter has added Facebook! A word to the wise for those on the run-post at your own peril, the Dog is watching!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog likes to say, "The apple doesn't fall far from the tree," and this is a hunt where that is true. So will Dog be able to use one family member's troubled ways to catch another one in trouble with the law?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: While the team tries to handle the bond that newcomer Alysin wrote incorrectly, sparks are flying between Beth and Duane Lee when he questions Beth's decision to go on the hunt without Dog leading the charge!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Two different young men both have a bad habit of missing their court dates. Looking over their files, Dog senses that they have another trait in common, both are a little too tied to their mothers.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target today has a history of violence, and apparently plans to re-locate without notifying the proper authorities. Unfortunately the team is missing a key player, Duane Lee is MIA today, distracted by his new lady love.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Duane Lee can't agree about what role Duane Lee should have in the family business. But the family comes together as they set out to hunt a chronic violator with an open warrant and a wife who has an odd request for Dog.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has dropped Duane Lee from the team. When Leland confronts Dog and Beth about the decision, tempers flare. But they have to come together to answer a cry for help from a mother who feels that the safest place for her daughter is jail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Cecily has graduated from High School, and Dog believes the time is right to show her what the family business is all about. The rough and tumble world of bounty hunting is very different from the all-girls private school she attended.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This one is close to home. Dog's target on today's hunt is the cousin of Kali, Garry Boy's caregiver. In addition, she has a reputation as a brawler. With Duane Lee still missing from the team, Baby Lyssa decides she will step up in this hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In an attempt to bring the team back together, Dog recruits his pastor, Tim Storey, to be the peacemaker. As Dog begins his hunt for a young man who has trouble showing up at court, Tim has his own mission--convince Duane Lee to meet with him.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With Duane Lee back on the team, the rift in the Chapman clan appears over. But will time heal this wound? As the family heads out for the seedier side of Honolulu in search of an erotic dancer, we will find out if the wound is truly healed.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When can a bounty hunt also be a date? When Dog and Beth decide to ride in the same SUV as they pursue a runaway fugitive, will their different approaches to the investigation lead to a capture and romance?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When an alleged abuser goes on, the lame Dog gathers the team to bring him in. As the leads grow colder, Dog's determination only grows stronger. Finally, a hot lead comes in and Dog sets the trap for his prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and company head to the Big Island in pursuit of two courthouse no-shows, only to find that one of them appears to be posting status updates from Southern California.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The cameras are turned around, as we get a tour of life "behind the scenes" on Dog the Bounty Hunter. Using interviews with Dog and the posse, the TV crew, and never before seen footage, this is one of most revealing and heartfelt episodes of the series.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive spells trouble for Dog in today's hunt. When the leads grow cold, it's the US Postal Service to the rescue as a mail carrier lends a helping hand. Dog's team surrounds the suspected safe house and silently awaits their prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's case involves a Samoan, so Dog knows that the runner's close-knit kinfolk holds the keys to bringing him in. Dog's plan is to convince the family that everyone is best served if the fugitive mans up and takes care of business.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target for today was once an upstanding member of his community. Now with no home, no job, and the law on his trail, this middle-aged exile from middle-class society is using the cold end of an ice pipe to soothe his troubled soul.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: A scandalous newspaper headline implicates Congressman McVane with a young girl in Washington; he realizes Alexis orchestrated his downfall. Kirby finds she is pregnant.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: When Blake learns Steven's attorney Chris has moved in with his son, he vows to fight for custody of little Danny. Morgan Hess, Alexis' private investigator, asks his employer for a large sum of money to pay off a gambling debt.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle and Alexis, trapped in a burning cabin far off in the woods, find the door has been locked--from the outside. Mark, who has come to see Krystle in this remote setting, dramatically rescues the two women, who are rushed to the hospital.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Mark is charged with attempted murder and arson; Alexis tells Blake and the police his motive was revenge. The other suspects-McVane, Hess and Adam, are questioned and released.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis receives a note from the late Joseph--he set the fire with the intention of killing her; Claudia is released from the sanitarium; Steven and Blake fight over little Danny.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Kirby physically attacks Alexis, demanding to know the reason Joseph wanted her dead; at the trial for custody of little Danny, Alexis testifies against Blake, who erupts in anger.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: As the custody trial continues, Fallon testifies on her brother's behalf while Sammy Jo defames her ex-husband. Fallon leaves for Montana to investigate Adam's past; Claudia hits on the scheme for Steven to retain custody of his son.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Steven and Claudia marry, and the judge dismisses the custody suit; Blake offers Krystle a public relations job; Adam tricks Alexis into signing blank documents; Fallon and Jeff uncover evidence suggesting Adam may have poisoned Jeff.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Adam frames Alexis for the poisoning incident, and Blake threatens to take the story public; Mark attacks Krystle; Denver-Carrington's publicist Tracy is disappointed that Krystle has been appointed department head.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Jeff accuses Alexis of attempting to murder him and reclaims his stock; Mark is hired as Alexis' bodyguard; Dex Dexter, the son of a board member, proposes he and Alexis form a business alliance.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dex continues his efforts to win Alexis; Jeff learns Adam raped Kirby; Krystle relishes her own publicity post; Fallon meets a dashing millionaire at the track.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dex beats Alexis to an oil contract; Jeff confronts Adam about Kirby's pregnancy; Krystle accepts Blake's marriage proposal.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dex beats Alexis to an oil contract; Jeff confronts Adam about Kirby's pregnancy; Krystle accepts Blake's marriage proposal.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Adam proposes marriage to Kirby, who intends to divorce Jeff; Tracy persuades Krystle to give her the company credit cards and confidential files; Peter makes a pass at Claudia; Krystle and Blake are remarried.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.desc: A martial arts book, which Hsu Yin-Fung (Jackie Chan) carries, is being highly sought by various clans and gangs, but he is in pursuit of someone himself.

programme.title: Dragon Fist
programme.desc: Tong Huo-wan (Jackie Chan) seeks redress from the man responsible for his master's death, but becomes entangled in a feud between a local clan and gangsters.

programme.title: Jackie Chan's Project A
programme.desc: Dragon Ma a lieutenant in the 19th-century Hong Kong marines battles Pirates that have been terrorizing local waters in this must-see adrenaline-pumping adventure delivers all the intense thrills and witty fun that Jackie Chan fans demand!

programme.title: Jackie Chan's Project A2 (A Gai Waak Juk Jaap)
programme.desc: Dragon Mao is assigned to lead the local police force but soon discovers that police corruption is running wild right under his nose. When he's framed for a jewelry robbery, Dragon Mao must fight to clear his name.

programme.title: Wheels On Meals
programme.desc: Action-packed and full of fun, set off on a wacky adventure with kung-fu fighting cousins Thomas and David whose simple life running a fast-food van in Spain is turned upside down by the beautiful pickpocket Sylvia.

programme.title: The Protector
programme.desc: Two New York cops, Billy Wong and Danny Garoni, head to Hong Kong after the daughter of a rich businessman is kidnapped by the drug lord, Mr. Ko.

programme.title: The Prisoner
programme.desc: Jackie Chan plays a shrewd cop who goes undercover with a team of mercenaries when a man he put away two years before commits a murder. The film features the great Sammo Hung as well as the terrific Tony Leung Ka Fai.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: Extremely silly comedy about a self-indulgent private investigator who winds up on a cruise ship full of rich patrons, gorgeous women, murderous terrorists, and scarce food.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: How did the stalker obtain the security system code for his victim's home? How did he steal her personal photographs? Police needed answers and they found them in the most unlikely of places.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After inspecting storm damage to a home in Tampa, an insurance assessor simply disappeared. Thirty hours later, her body was found in a nearby river. But the killer had been careless.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a hit-and-run accident claimed the life of a high school athlete, everyone in town mourned his passing. Finding the killer was a long shot at best.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A murder trail turned cold, until police got a call from a woman whose husband, Gerald Powers, had a criminal past and a fondness for Chevy Berettas.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, Grand Junction, Colorado is on edge after a series of deadly bombings kill two people and injure one more. Police race to find the culprit before he strikes again.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Lives changed in the 20 years following an unsolved murder, and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A lifelong resident of the tiny town of Lefroy, Tasmania was murdered outside his own home. Robbery appeared to be the motive, but with no suspects, the investigation came to a halt.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a wealthy socialite died after falling down the stairs, witness accounts contradicted evidence. To find out what really happened, investigators employed a physicist and an expert in accident reconstruction.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1997, Kelly Eckart's car was found, with her belongings still in it, after she worked a late shift in Franklin, Indiana. Days later, her body was found in an isolated ravine.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, Derrick Duehren returned to find his Oregon home burned to the ground. His wife's charred remains were later found in the rubble. Investigators set out to determine if it was an unfortunate accident or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family were executed in their own home. For three years, the murders went unsolved. Finally, a 30-year-old box of ammunition and some fluorescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was one of the most brazen crimes of the 20th century. Adolph Coors III, chairman of the Coors Brewing Company, was kidnapped and held for ransom. The crime prompted one of the most intense manhunts in United States history.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young girl was found dead, police quickly arrested the most likely suspect. But cutting-edge technology from NASA enabled a forensic odontologist to prove the wrong man was behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It's usually easy to determine how a criminal entered the crime scene. But in this case, it looked as if the killer vanished into thin air — and perhaps he had.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young fireman died from what appeared to be serious but undiagnosed heart disease, his family and friends had no proof of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Casino security cameras tracked a young woman's movements until shortly before she disappeared. She was never seen again, but through the evidence she left behind, she was able to tell investigators what happened to her and who was responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was one of the most unusual cases in forensic history. Investigators had to find a way to solve a murder case using only a squashed tomato found at the crime scene and tiny, pinpoint reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone or if she was the victim of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Seattle police had no suspects in the violent murder of grunge singer Mia Zapata. More than a decade passed before evidence collected by a prescient medical examiner could be used by forensic scientists to identify the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Michigan State University grad student disappeared and was presumed dead. With the help of a professor of geological sciences, police hoped to get the "dirt" on her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: How unlucky could one man be? His college sweetheart killed herself and fourteen years later, his wife ended her life in a similar way. Investigators had to determine if this was murder or simply a bizarre coincidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, 54-year-old Gayle Isleib was ambushed in her Manchester, Connecticut driveway and shot to death. Police had to determine whether obsessive love was the motive for her murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim had been sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on the beach. A pair of men's tennis shoes was discovered near her body. Police were sure that if they found the man who fit the shoes, they would also find the man who committed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl went missing from her Colorado home. The only evidence the kidnapper left behind was three fingerprints on a window screen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Several suspects and conflicting evidence complicated a brutal murder investigation. But the forensics were clear on one thing: the killer knew his victim, and that alone gave investigators a head start.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial killer was on the loose and police had to find him before he struck again. Their most promising lead was an unusual one: a bloody fingerprint on the body of one of the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On Halloween night 2004, Adriane Insogna and Leslie Mazzara were brutally murdered in their Napa, California home.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are tired of their dishpan hands and demand dishwashers from their husbands. They also don't think the Society Matrons League, a club they want to join, would approve. Their husbands believe they have it easy compared to the olden days.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A close inspection of her marriage license convinces Lucy that she and Ricky are not legally married. Because his name is misspelled on the certificate, Lucy insists Ricky go through the entire courtship and ultimately the marriage ceremony again.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky discovers a wad of cash in Lucy's purse and closet full of strange valuables and assumes they're all her ill-gotten gains. He doesn't realize Lucy has been legitimately collecting for her club's fundraising bazaar.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy feels left out when Ricky's two Cuban friends visit and converse mainly in Spanish. When she learns that little Renita, someone Ricky once danced with, is coming to town, she insists they reunite for a number.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel acquire a walk-in meat freezer. In an attempt to save money, they order two sides of beef, not realizing this is a tremendous amount. Hundreds of pounds of meat and $483 later, they must figure out a way to unload the beef.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is the emcee for a television variety show and Lucy wants to appear in one of its commercials. To prove to her husband that she has screen presence, she removes the inner parts of their TV set, gets into it, and does a commercial as he arrives home.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: As a publicity stunt to further Ricky's career, Lucy pretends she's an exotic princess from "Franistan" who has traveled halfway around the world to see Ricky perform. She books a suite at the Waldorf-Astoria and gets a lot of press attention.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Lucy screws up a dinner appointment with Ricky's new boss, Mr. Littlefield, and his wife because she is late, Ricky puts her on a strict time schedule. Later Ricky meets with Littlefield to discuss his possible promotion to manager of the club.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky impresses Lucy and the Mertzes with all the answers to a radio quiz show they are enjoying. He doesn't let on that the reason he knows the answers is that he was present at the taping. Lucy is so impressed that she signs him up as a contestant.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky begins wearing a hat around the apartment because he thinks he's going bald. Lucy thinks he's worrying needlessly but goes to a store that specializes in hair restoration in order to help Ricky feel better.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky tries to get a raise from his boss Mr. Littlefield but he is denied. Littlefield hires another act for the Tropicana and Lucy, Ethel and Fred decide to make sure no one shows up for the opening.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Upset at Lucy's irresponsible spending, Ricky suggests she could change her ways if she had a job. Lucy and Ethel propose switching roles with their husbands for a week; they will get jobs if the men stay home to do all the housework.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky and his band are going on a tour and Lucy wants to go too. She dusts off her old saxophone and goes down to the club dressed in a zoot suit to audition for a spot.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos' eleventh wedding anniversary is coming up and Ricky doesn't seem to be picking up the none-too-subtle hints Lucy is giving. She doesn't realize that Ricky has already made plans to buy a string of pearls at a discount from their neighbor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After seeing Fred use a pair of trick handcuffs, Lucy uses a similar pair to attach herself to Ricky as gag. She wants him to stay at home and not go to a rehearsal for a live TV show the next day.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel's club must put on an operetta to commemorate its 25th anniversary. However, Lucy, the club treasurer, admits to Ethel that for the past couple of years, she has been mismanaging both the club's budget and her own household budget.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Mertzes and Ricardos feel that their marriages are in a rut and they decide to follow the advice of a book and take a brief vacation from each other. The women move in together as do the guys but they soon all find that they miss each other.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: For the Mertzes' twenty-fifth wedding anniversary, Lucy and Ricky present them with a television set. As they are watching it, Ricky's constant adjustments cause the set to explode. Fred gets even by kicking in the Ricardos' TV set.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel enter a contest for new home furnishings. If they are the lucky winner, they must be home the next day to receive a phone call. Unfortunately Ricky has four tickets to a new musical which he really wants to see.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Tropicana club is about to re-open under new management and is looking to Ricky to put on the best possible show. The only problem is that Ricky has come down with a terrible case of laryngitis, and is unable to talk, much less sing.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Not feeling well, Lucy takes herself to the doctor and receives the happy news that she is pregnant. Ethel and Fred find out before Ricky and eagerly begin dreaming about being the lucky godparents. Getting the news to Ricky is not as easy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A doting husband and father-to-be, Ricky makes the mistake of giving more attention to the arriving baby than he does to his fickle wife. Ricky tries to please Lucy by making her waffles and he doubles his efforts by giving Lucy baby gifts.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is holding auditions for a new revue he's putting on at the Tropicana. Ricky tells Fred and Ethel that they should audition, but a pregnant Lucy wants part of the spotlight as well. Ricky doesn't go for the idea, so Lucy sneaks into an audition.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Wanting to provide the best environment possible for her child, Lucy decides that she and Ricky should learn to speak proper English. Lucy makes a deal with a tutor who will teach English to the Ricardos.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Al principio, cuando David Wilkey fue asesinado de un disparo en la zona rural de Virginia en 1983, pareció un accidente trágico de cacería. Un tenaz investigador de seguros sospechó de una maniobra sucia, pero no tenía pruebas concluyentes.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Una mujer buscada por la policía intenta mentirles a los agentes pero es delatada por su hermano. Las verduras enlatadas vuelan durante una pelea entre compañeras. Una pareja aprende el valor de la honestidad.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un hombre da su perspectiva sobre su propio arresto. Los oficiales tienen que lidiar con un hombre agresivo y salsa de BBQ. Una persecución a baja velocidad termina en casa de la novia del conductor.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: El pasajero de un auto en persecución logra escapar, pero el conductor no. Un motociclista fugitivo casi pierde a otra patrulla antes de estrellarse. Una mujer acusa a un hombre de querer robarle el pelo.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un conductor de un vehículo todo terreno casi atropella a los oficiales. Una sospechosa llora cuando descubren sus mentiras. Un asaltador despierta con un mensaje que prueba su culpabilidad.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un fugitivo corre por toda la autopista en medio del tráfico. Una discusión fuerte se agranda cuando una mujer comienza a romper ventanas. Un hombre sin control explota en furia mientras conduce.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un pasajero causa problemas en una parada de tránsito. Una familia se llena de alegría cuando recuperan a su cachorro robado. Una mujer batalla con baches en su camino a la recuperación.

programme.title: Cops en español

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Algunas personas se salen con la suya, al menos por un tiempo. Seguros de su éxito, los asesinos en serie matan una y otra vez. Pero cada vez que lo hacen, dejan algunas pistas más y, en última instancia, ellas los llevan a la ruina.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Algunas de las mejores pistas provienen de los lugares menos probables. Los crímenes más difíciles se han resuelto y delincuentes han sido traicionados a través de la evidencia proporcionada por insectos y botellas de cerveza.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Nunca hay una buena razón para matar, pero algunos asesinos son particularmente brutales. Eligen a sus víctimas sin motivo y luego cubren la evidencia con astucia. Aun así, quedan pistas cruciales.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Estos casos tardaron una década o más en resolverse. No hay un estatuto de limitaciones para asesinatos. Cuando el caso se enfría, las pistas se vuelven escasas. Los investigadores deben usar la ciencia para cerrar los casos inconclusos.
